messages.text: These are very pleasant words, and I don't often receive such compliments. Because most people are only interested in certain parts of my body, not me as a whole. So it's doubly pleasant to hear this now, and I'm glad that you're a man who sees it. It's a shame that we never managed to build something together or even meet in person 🙏🏼

text_entities.text: These are very pleasant words, and I don't often receive such compliments. Because most people are only interested in certain parts of my body, not me as a whole. So it's doubly pleasant to hear this now, and I'm glad that you're a man who sees it. It's a shame that we never managed to build something together or even meet in person 🙏🏼

messages.text:
Hi, how are you? I hope you’re doing well and that life is treating you kindly.
I’m really sorry to hear that people haven’t always seen you for who you truly are. You deserve to be appreciated for your whole self your heart, your personality, your soul not just for how you look. And honestly, that’s what makes you even more beautiful in my eyes.
It does make me feel a little sad too, thinking that we never got the chance to truly build something together or even meet in person. I genuinely believe there could have been something special between us.
Still, I want you to know that I meant every word you’re not just charming and attractive, you have a presence that stays in the mind. And any man who truly sees you the way you deserve is a lucky one.
Take care of yourself… and who knows, life has a funny way of bringing people back together sometimes 🤍 ❤️😘

text_entities.text:

messages.text:
Well, then there's no need to call it a scam just because you don't like the price🙂 There are regular cheap buses, and there are comfortable minibuses for those who want to travel 15 hours properly, rather than getting off the bus in a terrible condition.
I'm not saying there aren't other options. There are, and they're much cheaper. But I initially explained why I chose this particular option and why I feel comfortable with it.

So the question isn't whether there's a cheaper bus, but whether you want me to reach you in a normal condition and with comfort. That's a completely different matter.

text_entities.text:
Well, then there's no need to call it a scam just because you don't like the price🙂 There are regular cheap buses, and there are comfortable minibuses for those who want to travel 15 hours properly, rather than getting off the bus in a terrible condition.
I'm not saying there aren't other options. There are, and they're much cheaper. But I initially explained why I chose this particular option and why I feel comfortable with it.

So the question isn't whether there's a cheaper bus, but whether you want me to reach you in a normal condition and with comfort. That's a completely different matter.
